svg.title: DRMS Class Diagram
svg.desc: Class diagram for the Disaster Relief Management System showing User, Admin, Volunteer, AffectedPerson, Donor, ReliefCamp, AidRequest, Task, Donation, Notification classes with their attributes, methods and relationships.
svg.text: Multiplicity: 1 = exactly one 0..* = zero or many 1..* = one or many
